value.found_quote: Antigravity CLI leverages a multi-threaded asynchronous execution architecture. Instead of locking your terminal session during long-running builds, massive codebase search sweeps, or complex multi-file edits, the primary agent delegates these operations to parallel **Subagents** or background **Tasks**.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a multi-threaded async architecture where the primary agent delegates long-running operations to parallel autonomous Subagents and background Tasks. It also describes the interactive "/agents" panel (the Agent Manager Panel) for monitoring these subagents, directly substantiating all key elements of the claim: multi-threaded async architecture, delegation to parallel autonomous Subagents, tracked background tasks, and an interactive monitoring panel.
